# comfyui_workspace_to_prompt (Data Source)

Translates ComfyUI workspace or subgraph JSON into prompt JSON with structured fidelity reporting.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_workspace_to_prompt" "example" {
  workspace_json = jsonencode({
    version = 1
    id      = "workspace-example"
    name    = "Workspace Example"
    nodes   = []
    links   = []
    groups  = []
    config  = {}
    extra   = {}
    definitions = {
      subgraphs = []
    }
  })
}

output "prompt_fidelity" {
  value = data.comfyui_workspace_to_prompt.example.fidelity
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_json` (String) ComfyUI workspace or subgraph JSON to translate.

### Read-Only

- `fidelity` (String) Overall translation fidelity classification.
- `notes` (List of String) Human-readable translation notes.
- `preserved_fields` (List of String) Field paths preserved exactly during translation.
- `prompt_json` (String) Translated prompt JSON.
- `synthesized_fields` (List of String) Field paths synthesized during translation.
- `unsupported_fields` (List of String) Field paths dropped or not representable during translation.
